name: Drakonis96
subtitle: All of Drakonis96's apps in one place.
description: The official AltStore/SideStore source for all of Drakonis96's apps. Add this source once to install and auto-update MyTrackpad, Tesstats, Nautilarr, ScanKit and anything new that lands here.

apps.name: MyTrackpad
apps.subtitle: Wireless trackpad & keyboard for your Mac.
apps.localizedDescription:
MyTrackpad turns your iPhone or iPad into a wireless trackpad and keyboard for your Mac.

• Real multi-touch gestures: move, tap to click, two-finger right-click, two-finger scroll, pinch to zoom, and double-tap-and-hold to drag.
• Built-in keyboard, arrow keys and quick-function buttons (brightness, volume, media, Mission Control, Spotlight, dictation).
• Automatic discovery over Bonjour, plus a manual-IP fallback for networks where discovery is blocked.
• Native, minimal Liquid Glass design for iOS 26.

Requires the free companion app "MyTrackpad Server" running on your Mac (macOS 26+). Get it from the GitHub releases page.

versions.localizedDescription:
Smoother cursor and fixed gestures.

• Smoother cursor: full-rate (coalesced) touch sampling on iOS plus relative-delta injection on the Mac removes the stutter.
• Fixes a left tap sometimes registering as a right-click (a resting/grazing finger no longer counts as a two-finger tap).
• Hold an arrow (or Delete/Tab) to repeat it — keys now send press-and-hold with native auto-repeat.
• Mission Control and Zoom buttons work reliably (Zoom is now Zoom +/− using ⌘+ / ⌘−).
• New multi-finger gestures: three-finger swipe left/right to switch spaces, up for Mission Control, down for App Exposé. Pinch-to-zoom detection improved.
• New quick-function buttons: App windows, Prev/Next space.

Maintenance release.

• Fixes the macOS server failing to open (Gatekeeper “damaged”) and not appearing in the Accessibility list, by documenting a quarantine-free install (curl one-liner) and shipping a signed .zip.
• Same iOS app; rebuilt as 1.0.1.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: MyTrackpad finds your Mac on the local network to connect and control it as a trackpad.

apps.name: Tesstats
apps.subtitle: Read-only Tesla stats from your TeslaMate.
apps.localizedDescription:
Tesstats is a beautiful, read-only stats app for your Tesla, powered by your own self-hosted TeslaMate server.

• Live dashboard: battery, range, charging, climate, security, tire pressure, location.
• Trips with maps and consumption.
• Charging sessions with real charge curves (kW vs %SoC).
• Battery health and degradation over time.
• Rich statistics: trends, records, cost, CO2 saved, phantom drain, heatmap.
• Home Screen & Lock Screen widgets, a charging Live Activity, and Siri shortcuts.
• Notifications, multi-car, offline cache, encrypted backups, CSV/JSON/GPX export.

Tesstats is strictly read-only — it never sends any command to your car. It talks only to your own server (MQTT + TeslaMateApi), with everything encrypted by default.

versions.localizedDescription:
More from your TeslaMate data:
• Battery health now uses TeslaMate's official calculation (capacity & range, new vs now).
• Software update history — every firmware version with its install date.
• Charging efficiency and the energy lost to charging.
• Optional price per charging location for more accurate cost estimates.
• Peak regeneration record, plus per-trip regen and usable battery.
• Low tire-pressure warnings straight from the car.
• Fixed the cost trend chart, and the weekday chart now starts on Monday.

Themes & display polish:
• New light theme alongside the default dark theme (Settings → Appearance).
• Pick your accent color from 10 presets — it's applied across the whole app.
• Activity heatmap now spans the full card width, so its left and right margins match.

Accurate trip maps:
• Trip routes are now drawn from the real GPS positions recorded by TeslaMate, fetched per drive from TeslaMateApi — no more geocoding the address text.
• Fixes maps that landed in the wrong place when a city name was ambiguous (e.g. Toledo, Spain resolving to Toledo, USA).
• Elevation profiles now come from the actual drive trace too.

Connection robustness and clarity:
• MQTT host now accepts a plain hostname — any scheme or path you paste is stripped automatically (fixes a DNS resolution error).
• History API URL completes https:// if you omit it.
• Unique MQTT client-id per connection prevents a reconnect loop that made the status flicker.
• Clearer hints on the Server settings fields (host vs full URL).
• Full Spanish and English localization with an in-app language selector.
Initial public release.

apps.versionDescription:
More from your TeslaMate data:
• Battery health now uses TeslaMate's official calculation (capacity & range, new vs now).
• Software update history — every firmware version with its install date.
• Charging efficiency and the energy lost to charging.
• Optional price per charging location for more accurate cost estimates.
• Peak regeneration record, plus per-trip regen and usable battery.
• Low tire-pressure warnings straight from the car.
• Fixed the cost trend chart, and the weekday chart now starts on Monday.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Connects to your self-hosted TeslaMate server on your local network.

apps.name: Nautilarr
apps.subtitle: Self-hosted media services client
apps.localizedDescription: Nautilarr is an open-source client for managing self-hosted media services through their public REST APIs. Browse libraries, search and add titles, monitor download queues and server health — all from a native, adaptive interface for iPhone, iPad and Mac.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Nautilarr connects to your self-hosted services on your local network.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Nautilarr uses Face ID to protect SSH access and settings.

apps.name: ScanKit
apps.subtitle: Scan, process, OCR and organize documents — all on-device.
apps.localizedDescription:
ScanKit is a native iOS document scanner built for power users who want full control over capturing, processing and exporting their documents. Everything runs on-device; nothing leaves your iPhone or iPad unless you turn on iCloud sync.

• Smart camera: live edge detection, auto-capture, manual corner adjustment with a zoom loupe, torch, zoom, framing grid, batch/continuous scanning and a book/pair mode.
• Powerful processing: color / grayscale / black & white (adaptive binarization) / auto modes, background whitening, deskew, perspective correction, full manual adjustments and reusable presets with live preview.
• On-device OCR (Vision): searchable PDFs, copy and extract text, search by document content, Spotlight indexing.
• Flexible export: searchable + password-protected PDF, JPEG / PNG / TIFF, plain text, batch file naming, and the native share sheet (AirDrop, Mail, Files, Print, Save to Photos).
• Organized library: nested folders with colors and emoji, tags, favorites, recents, trash, grid/list views, sorting, search and bulk operations.
• Adaptive design for iPhone and iPad, with Siri/Shortcuts and Home Screen quick actions.

versions.localizedDescription:
Working scan-mode switch + clearer color modes.

• Scanner: Auto / Manual / Double are now always-visible buttons that switch instantly (the old hidden menu felt unresponsive). “Double” captures a book/magazine spread and splits it into two pages; picking “Auto” always works even if auto-capture was set to Off.
• Color modes verified: Color is the original photo, B&W is adaptive monochrome, and Grayscale is now its own gentler look — clean page with the gray tones preserved, not a hard black & white.
• Combining or duplicating pages now keeps the full-color source, so switching a page back to Color still restores the original capture.
• Image export (JPEG/PNG/TIFF) now honors the chosen Resolution (DPI).
• Adding pages to an already-open document no longer opens a duplicate screen.

Interface polish + multi-select.

• Select multiple documents right from the main library (and Recents/Favorites): a new Select button, Select All, and a count in the title, then move / tag / export / combine / delete in bulk.
• Fixed icons (the OCR text panel no longer uses a chat-bubble) and more consistent spacing.
• Verified the page-preview edit controls (rotate, color, size, OCR, process, delete) work with progress feedback.

Editing in the page preview + responsive feedback.

• Tapping a page now opens it full-screen with the full edit toolbar: rotate, color, size, OCR, process and delete — all on that page.
• Color / size / process now run in the background with a progress indicator and a success haptic, so you can tell they're working (no more silent freeze).
• Page changes reflect immediately in the viewer and grid.

Color modes, scan sizes and safer trash.

• Color / Grayscale / B&W now work reliably — pages keep a full-color source and re-derive non-destructively, so switching back to Color restores the original capture.
• Scan size in Settings (Letter, A4, A5, A6, A3, Legal, Square…), default A4, plus your own custom sizes you can set as default.
• Change page size in bulk on selected pages (like rotate and color).
• Deleting from Trash now asks for confirmation.
• Cleaner OCR indicator icon.

Visual polish.

• Fixed document and page thumbnails overlapping / overflowing their cells.
• Removed the tiny status dots that looked like (un-tappable) buttons over each page.
• Cleaner icon-based toolbars in the page editor (Add / Select / Export, and rotate / color / process / delete when selecting).
• Clearer multi-select with checkmarks and Select All.

Bug fixes from device testing.

• Fixed scans coming out blank/white and rotated to landscape (camera orientation is now normalized before perspective correction).
• Fixed black & white / auto pages being blown out to pure white (rewrote the binarization).
• Page editor: clearer multi-select with Select All, rotate left/right on selected pages, and a quick color / grayscale / B&W switch per page or selection.

First public release of ScanKit.

• Full document scanner with live edge detection, auto-capture and manual corner adjustment.
• On-device image processing, presets, OCR and searchable PDF export.
• Folder-based library with tags, favorites, search and bulk actions.
• iPhone and iPad layouts, Siri/Shortcuts and Home Screen quick actions.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: ScanKit uses the camera to scan and capture your documents.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ScanKit imports images from your photo library to turn them into documents.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ScanKit saves exported scans to your photo library.
